/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Minesweeper.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Minesweeper.dir/src/tileRender.cpp.o -o Debug/Minesweeper  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/josh/Downloads/CS225-Project/build/Debug Debug/libSDL3_image.0.5.0.dylib Debug/libSDL3.0.dylib
